rows.sign_convention: Positive issuance variables imply more Treasury supply to the public.
rows.notes: Headline plumbing variant uses exact bill net issuance and exact combined non-bill net issuance reconstructed from official auction settlement data; controls are weekly changes in TGA and a QT proxy.
